jokes.text: Dad, will you look at Sweet Dee's skin and tell me it's not blotchy?
jokes.setup: Dennis obsessing over Dee's supposed skin problems
jokes.punchline: Dragging their father into the petty argument
jokes.explanation: Sets up the characters' awful dynamic immediately - Dennis's vanity and need to drag others down

jokes.text: Do I have to listen to this shit all morning?
jokes.setup: Being asked to mediate a stupid argument about skin
jokes.punchline: Frank's blunt refusal to engage with their nonsense
jokes.explanation: Perfect Frank reaction - completely done with their petty bullshit

jokes.text: I found some extensive water damage in the back office
jokes.setup: Charlie caught sleeping in the bar, needs an excuse
jokes.punchline: Tries to spin his irresponsible behavior as helpful discovery
jokes.explanation: Classic Charlie logic - turning his fuckup into a positive contribution

jokes.text: maybe I'm not such a bad guy... for passing out in there and drinking too much or whatever
jokes.setup: Trying to justify sleeping in the bar
jokes.punchline: Frames excessive drinking and passing out as heroic acts
jokes.explanation: Charlie's twisted logic is perfectly executed - he genuinely sees himself as the hero here

jokes.text: That is the Virgin Mary
jokes.setup: Everyone gathering to look at something
jokes.punchline: Mac's immediate religious interpretation of a water stain
jokes.explanation: Perfect Mac moment - his Catholic obsession making him see miracles everywhere

jokes.text: Listen. It could be a miracle. It could be bullshit. There's only one thing we know for sure... It's a goddamn gold mine.
jokes.setup: Debate about whether the stain is religious or not
jokes.punchline: Dennis cuts through the debate to focus on profit potential
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dennis line - cuts through everyone's bullshit with pure sociopathic capitalism. Great structure and economy.

jokes.text: I'd just finished praying on my rosaries. And I was doing some crunches, you know, working on my abs.
jokes.setup: Mac giving a TV interview about his religious experience
jokes.punchline: Mixing spiritual devotion with vanity workout routine
jokes.explanation: Classic Mac - his vanity about his body mixed with religious pretension

jokes.text: Did my face look fat?
jokes.setup: Just finished a TV interview about a religious miracle
jokes.punchline: Dennis's only concern is his appearance on camera
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dennis narcissism - completely missing the point of everything

jokes.text: Well, what price can one put on the viewing of a miracle?
jokes.setup: Customer asking how much to donate
jokes.punchline: Mac's slick non-answer that sounds profound but means nothing
jokes.explanation: Well-crafted con artist speak - sounds wise but is pure manipulation

jokes.text: I only made four dollars, Deandra
jokes.setup: Dee expressing guilt about exploiting people's faith
jokes.punchline: Frank's defense is the pathetically small profit
jokes.explanation: Brilliant Frank logic - the low amount somehow makes the moral violation acceptable

jokes.text: Taking advantage of the mother of God. Are you kidding me? That is a water stain, man.
jokes.setup: Mac criticizing their exploitation of religion
jokes.punchline: Charlie being the voice of reason about it being just a stain
jokes.explanation: Good role reversal - Charlie being the rational one while Mac gets religious

jokes.text: I was the only other person in physical therapy with you
jokes.setup: Cricket recognizing Dee from their past
jokes.punchline: Revealing they were the only two people in therapy - emphasizing their shared loser status
jokes.explanation: Sets up their shared awkward history effectively

jokes.text: I called it from across the bar, even without the cripple braces
jokes.setup: Recognizing Cricket despite his changed appearance
jokes.punchline: Mac's proud but callous reference to Cricket's former disability
jokes.explanation: Typical Mac insensitivity delivered with pride

jokes.text: does my face look fat to you?
jokes.setup: Reconnecting with old friend after years
jokes.punchline: Dennis's only concern is still his appearance
jokes.explanation: Callback to his earlier obsession - Dennis can't help himself

jokes.text: What did we call you in high school? Rickety Cricket, dude!
jokes.setup: Nostalgic conversation with old friend
jokes.punchline: Fondly recalling the cruel nickname they gave him
jokes.explanation: Shows how oblivious they are to their own cruelty

jokes.text: remember how you would pass out at parties... and Dennis would tea-bag you?
jokes.setup: Reminiscing about high school
jokes.punchline: Casually recounting sexual humiliation they inflicted
jokes.explanation: Escalates the cringe - they're proudly recounting horrible bullying

jokes.text: Everybody loved those photos, Matty... My balls on your chin... I got a whole shoe box of those things
jokes.setup: Already established the tea-bagging story
jokes.punchline: Revealing the systematic documentation and distribution of the humiliation
jokes.explanation: Masterful escalation - each detail makes it worse and shows their complete lack of self-awareness

jokes.text: Hey, you still get balls-to-the-chin cracks? / No. Actually, that was a long time ago.
jokes.setup: Mac asking about current teasing
jokes.punchline: Implying Cricket still gets mocked for their high school humiliation
jokes.explanation: Continues the dark theme of their casual cruelty toward Cricket

jokes.text: why did you pause before you said 'no' earlier?
jokes.setup: Cricket trying to leave after uncomfortable conversation
jokes.punchline: Dennis obsessing over a micro-hesitation about his appearance
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dennis neurosis - analyzing every micro-expression for threats to his vanity

jokes.text: Remember the time you said you'd kiss him... if he ate a horse turd? He ate the whole turd.
jokes.setup: Discussing how to manipulate Cricket
jokes.punchline: Casually revealing extreme past manipulation and humiliation
jokes.explanation: Shocking escalation that perfectly demonstrates how awful they are. The casual delivery makes it even more disturbing.

jokes.text: The priest may not do it because she's getting old... Your skin's all blotchy... You got the crow's-feet
jokes.setup: Discussing whether Cricket will help them
jokes.punchline: Brutal assessment of Dee's declining attractiveness
jokes.explanation: Callback to opening argument but escalated with multiple insults

jokes.text: I kind of led you on a little bit back then, didn't I?
jokes.setup: Trying to manipulate Cricket into helping
jokes.punchline: Massive understatement of her cruel manipulation
jokes.explanation: Perfect understatement - 'led you on a little' for making him eat shit

jokes.text: You do realize you're leading me on right now? I'm a priest.
jokes.setup: Dee trying to seduce him for the favor
jokes.punchline: Cricket calling out the manipulation while highlighting the moral problem
jokes.explanation: Great self-aware moment - Cricket learned to recognize her patterns

jokes.text: Could you bless me, please?... In the name of the Father, the Son, Holy Spirit. Amen.
jokes.setup: Customer asking Charlie for a blessing
jokes.punchline: Charlie actually performing religious rites despite having no authority
jokes.explanation: Good escalation of the religious fraud - Charlie getting into character

jokes.text: I may have saved that poor, wretched old person's life
jokes.setup: Charlie just blessed someone
jokes.punchline: His grandiose interpretation of a fake blessing
jokes.explanation: Charlie's delusion escalating perfectly - now he thinks he has divine powers

jokes.text: you could be my Peter... Dress a little nicer though, 'cause you look like shit
jokes.setup: Charlie offering Mac a honored biblical position
jokes.punchline: Immediately undermining the spiritual moment with a petty insult
jokes.explanation: Perfect juxtaposition of the sacred and petty - very Charlie

jokes.text: I've been fasting for three days, so I probably look good
jokes.setup: Someone asking what's wrong with Dennis
jokes.punchline: His delusional confidence while clearly looking terrible
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dennis delusion - thinking starvation makes him look better

jokes.text: It's 'cause we said his face looks fat
jokes.setup: Dennis explaining his religious fasting
jokes.punchline: Mac revealing the real petty reason
jokes.explanation: Good callback that reveals Dennis's true motivation

jokes.text: The cats are brown
jokes.setup: Trying to talk to the priest about blessing their stain
jokes.punchline: The priest's completely random, senile response
jokes.explanation: Brilliantly random non-sequitur that shows the priest is completely out of it

jokes.text: The cats are brown. / What? / The cats are brown.
jokes.setup: Trying to talk to drunk priest about blessing
jokes.punchline: His completely random, nonsensical response
jokes.explanation: Brilliant absurdist moment - completely random statement that becomes memorable quote

jokes.text: This guy's perfect. Let's go clean him up.
jokes.setup: Priest clearly being senile and incompetent
jokes.punchline: Frank seeing this as exactly what they need
jokes.explanation: Perfect Frank logic - the more incompetent the priest, the better for their scam

jokes.text: What are you doing? - What is that? - Why are you dressed like this? - Come on. It's perfect. I told you to dress nice. We look like salt and pepper shakers.
jokes.setup: Charlie appears in religious costume
jokes.punchline: Mac compares their contrasting outfits to condiment shakers
jokes.explanation: Great visual comedy and Mac's perfect condiment metaphor

jokes.text: We look like salt and pepper shakers
jokes.setup: Charlie and Mac dressed in matching religious outfits
jokes.punchline: Charlie's assessment of their ridiculous appearance
jokes.explanation: Good visual gag reference - implies they look ridiculous in matching outfits

jokes.text: I don't know who my father is... so am I the messiah?
jokes.setup: Charlie comparing himself to Jesus
jokes.punchline: Using his unknown paternity as evidence of divinity
jokes.explanation: Brilliant Charlie logic - turning his sad backstory into messianic evidence. Perfect character integration.

jokes.text: I'm in love with a man... a man called God. Does that make me gay? Am I gay for God?
jokes.setup: Frank's confession while drunk
jokes.punchline: His confused interpretation of religious devotion as sexual attraction
jokes.explanation: Hilariously confused religious revelation - Frank's brain trying to process spirituality

jokes.text: Let's go toe-to-toe on the Bible, bitch
jokes.setup: Mac and Charlie fighting over religious authority
jokes.punchline: Mac challenging Charlie to biblical combat
jokes.explanation: Great escalation of their petty rivalry into biblical scholarship battle

jokes.text: Let's go toe-to-toe on the Bible, bitch. / Ask and ye shall receive, sucker.
jokes.setup: Religious competition between Mac and Charlie
jokes.punchline: Treating Bible knowledge like a street fight with trash talk
jokes.explanation: Good contrast between sacred subject matter and aggressive competition

jokes.text: And, oh, Matty, I mean you could really, really have me
jokes.setup: Dee confessing love in the confessional
jokes.punchline: Her inappropriate sexual suggestion to a priest in church
jokes.explanation: Good cringe moment - Dee being inappropriate in sacred space

jokes.text: And, oh, Matty, I mean you could really, really have me.
jokes.setup: Dee's romantic confession
jokes.punchline: Sexual proposition to priest in confession booth
jokes.explanation: Pure cringe comedy - extremely inappropriate sexual advance in religious setting

jokes.text: But what's in between the lines? / What's in between the lines is that he has to take off his damn sandals because it's sacred ground. / No! Sacred ground? Sacred ground? God doesn't worship the ground. God made the ground.
jokes.setup: Bible interpretation competition
jokes.punchline: Charlie's bizarre theological logic about why God would want Moses barefoot
jokes.explanation: Good Charlie logic - completely wrong but delivered with absolute confidence

jokes.text: God doesn't think Moses is gonna do it... God is gonna reward him with some sweet-ass shoes
jokes.setup: Charlie explaining the Moses/burning bush story
jokes.punchline: His interpretation that God is testing Moses for footwear rewards
jokes.explanation: Masterpiece of Charlie logic - completely reinterpreting biblical narrative through his warped worldview. Brilliant originality and character integration.

jokes.text: Trust in God, he'll give you shoes
jokes.setup: Charlie's Moses interpretation
jokes.punchline: His simple life philosophy derived from biblical misinterpretation
jokes.explanation: Perfect distillation of Charlie's worldview into a simple, quotable philosophy. Excellent economy and character work.

jokes.text: Ooh, cats! And they're brown!
jokes.setup: Drunk priest being led around the bar
jokes.punchline: Repeating his earlier nonsensical observation
jokes.explanation: Good callback to his earlier senile comment

jokes.text: because you're a bad person
jokes.setup: Dennis asking why Dee called his skin blotchy
jokes.punchline: Dee's blunt, honest assessment
jokes.explanation: Perfect moment of honesty - Dee dropping all pretense

jokes.text: The Virgin Mary has left us! She abandoned us 'cause we listen to a false prophet!
jokes.setup: Water stain getting damaged
jokes.punchline: Mac's dramatic religious interpretation of plumbing failure
jokes.explanation: Good Mac escalation - turning mundane pipe issue into religious crisis

jokes.text: No! No, get away from there! Get him away! Back off. Oh. What did you do, you shithead? You ruined it!
jokes.setup: Drunk priest approaching the stain
jokes.punchline: Mac's panic as his scam literally gets washed away
jokes.explanation: Good escalation and comeuppance - Mac's scam literally dissolving before his eyes

jokes.text: I felt safe saying those things in the first place
jokes.setup: Cricket saying he left the priesthood for her
jokes.punchline: Dee revealing she only confessed because she thought he couldn't act on it
jokes.explanation: Devastating honesty that perfectly captures Dee's selfishness - she only felt safe being honest because she thought there would be no consequences

jokes.text: You know what would make you feel better? You wanna tea-bag Dennis?
jokes.setup: Cricket's life is ruined
jokes.punchline: Offering him revenge through the same humiliation they used to inflict
jokes.explanation: Brilliant callback and role reversal - now Dennis is the vulnerable one. Perfect dark comedy conclusion that shows they learned nothing.
